hypothesis: For late-delivery prediction, an XGBoost classifier will outperform logistic regression on held-out data, particularly in AUC-ROC and recall.
shap_driver_caveat: First Class shipping-mode SHAP effect is dominant; granular geography indicators may be sparse or high-cardinality.
limitations: Validation evidence only; final test remains untouched; SHAP driver interpretations are model associations and not causal effects.
